{{Quote|An incandescent organ of life, visibly vibrating with the pulses of billions.|Signet Mezzileen speaking of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]|<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />}}
'''Signet Mezzileen''' was a [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He ruled over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for 70 [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and often praised it as [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] "biggest little neighborhood."<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />

[[Mezzileen Spaceport|A spaceport]] on Coruscant was named after him.<ref name="Darth Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>
